failure_movement.justification: Empty: predicted 18->4-7, actual 18->12 (right direction, overshot magnitude). Wrong: predicted ~+1-2, actual 6->9 (+3, close). Unknown: predicted shrink to 19-21, actual EXPLODED 29->52 (+23) -- wrong direction on the dominant cluster; missed correct collapse 47->27.

trace_movement.justification: Prompt-token claim (~1500-1700) contradicted: rose to 1813. Hits claim (6-8) contradicted: actual 12-16 (avg 15.2). Bimodal-completion partly right (new >=450 band) but predicted 300-450 empties actually sit at 512; the high tail is empties, not completed answers.

side_effects.justification: Strongly confirmed risk 1: Qwen3 hidden-thinking still burns budget -- all 12 empties hit exactly 512 tokens, the predicted truncation mode. Risks 2-3 (list truncation, reasoning_content fallback) plausible but unverified. Missed flagging the headline passrate collapse and unknown explosion as likely outcomes.
